case_title: CENTRAL BUILDERS SUPPLY, INC. VS. EDWARD B. DELAO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED MAY-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD B.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTRAL BUILDERS SUPPLY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $465.97 FILED BY CENTRAL BUILDERS SUPPLY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTRAL BUILDERS SUPPLY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD B. $413.47 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $498.47, DEFENDANT EDWARD B. DELAO NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD B.
